# Style oncogenicity cell background based on value (Generated by Claude Opus 4.6 with some manual tweaks)

Style oncogenicity cell background based on value (Generated by Claude
Opus 4.6 with some manual tweaks)

## Usage

``` r
render_oncogenicity_cell(data, color_palette = pcgrr::color_palette)
```

## Arguments

- data:

  The main data frame (passed via closure)

## Value

An HTML span element with background color corresponding to the
oncogenicity category, using colors defined in
color_palette\$oncogenicity.
